name: Organization Management
description: Create, list, view, update, and delete organizations; invite members; assign/update member roles; view org-scoped scan history and dashboard.

frontend.evidence: grep -rl "/api/orgs" frontend/*.html returns 0 matches (independently re-verified 2026-07-08, in addition to the original 2026-07-08 Phase 0 audit finding in docs/SAAS_PRODUCTIZATION_MISSION_BRIEF.md:208). Zero create/select/invite/switch UI exists anywhere in the frontend.

navigation.evidence: No nav entry anywhere links to any organization page, because no organization page exists.

test_coverage.evidence: workers/test/orgRbacIsolation.test.mjs and workers/test/phase9OrgDashboardSchema.test.mjs both import directly from workers/src/handlers/orgManagement.js (handleInviteMember/handleUpdateMemberRole/handleRemoveMember, and handleOrgDashboard/handleOrgScans respectively) — confirmed by direct import-statement grep, 2026-07-08.

verification.evidence: workers/src/handlers/orgManagement.js read directly (10 exported handle* functions + ROLE_PERMISSIONS confirmed); frontend/*.html grepped for '/api/orgs' (0 matches, independently re-run). Backend additionally has dynamic_api evidence via scripts/ceap-sweep.mjs:92-101, which calls POST /api/orgs, GET /api/orgs/{id}/dashboard, GET /api/orgs/{id}/scans directly via fetch every 6h — real, valid confirmation the API works, but zero evidence about frontend/UI, which this entry's frontend/navigation fields establish separately via static code inspection.

contradicts_doc.claim: Organizations: create / members / RBAC / dashboard / scan history | GA APPROVED | Full admin loop live-verified this phase; RC-B1 fix verified at Phase IX gate
contradicts_doc.correction: The "live-verified" evidence behind this claim is scripts/ceap-sweep.mjs, which calls the API directly (dynamic_api). No dynamic_browser (real customer, real page) verification exists or was possible: zero frontend pages call any /api/orgs* endpoint. Corrected status: NOT READY (backend-only, P2). This is the specific mistake this registry's verification.method field exists to make structurally impossible going forward.

notes: Highest-value single gap identified across the whole platform: full, working, RBAC-enforced backend with a complete admin loop, and precisely zero customer-facing UI. Building the frontend for this capability is a separate, future implementation program — this entry's job is to make the gap visible, evidenced, and correctly prioritized, not to close it.
